kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

test.name: Verify the system displays validation text when user input annn and Dev123!@#

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

errors.msg: Multiple tests with name 'Verify the system displays validation text when user input and Dev123!@#' executed in suite 'Signin'.
Multiple tests with name 'Verify the system displays validation text when user input bennguyen and DEVPASSWORD1234!@' executed in suite 'Signin'.
Multiple tests with name 'Verify the system displays validation text when user input bennguyen and ' executed in suite 'Signin'.
